title: hebe haastii
intro: Hebe haastii, also known as the Haast's hebe or Haast's tree hebe, is a species of flowering plant in the hebe genus, native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat colds and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, and can be used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures. In herbal preparations, Hebe haastii is often combined with other plants to create remedies for coughs, sore throats, and other respiratory issues.
